forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 13.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 12:20pm to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 12.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Light winds.
Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Possible small hail at night. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon with possible small hail near the coast. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. The chance of fog near the coast in the early morning. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Possible small hail in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, with possible small hail in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 12.
Cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly clear. Light winds.
Mostly sunny. Patchy morning fog. The chance of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 12.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the east in the early morning. The chance of morning frost in the east. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.

Cloudy. Areas of morning frost in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Clear. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog and frost south of Hawker in the morning. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the coast in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost south of Hawker. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 11:40am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Clear. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day then tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Sunny. The chance of fog and frost south of Yunta in the morning. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 26.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Sunny. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 22.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
